title: Define Columns of List View
text: Define Columns of List View Define columns for the Tree widget's list view, and the way they are formatted in Details style. This dialog box enables you to define each column and its characteristics individually. Note: If you want to dynamically change these settings in ProcScript, you need to do so using the tree widget's Labels and Formats properties. For more information, see ProcScript Labels and Formats . Limits maximum number of columns = 127 maximum number of characters per column = 9999 maximum number of characters in column labels (LABELS element of $fieldproperties or $properties ) =1023 Fields Label Sorting Decimal Indicator Alignment Column Width How to Defining Tree Widgets Related Links utree (Tree) The utree widget enables users to view and navigate structured data as a hierarchy. Uniface provides a logical widget called Tree, which is mapped to utree. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
